ProxyLens
ProjectsOpen dashboard

API debugging without guesswork

Proxy third-party APIs and inspect every request, header, and response in one place.

ProxyLens sits between your client and the target API, forwards the call, stores the exchange, and streams fresh traffic straight into a focused dashboard built for integration debugging.

Launch workspaceConfigure a project
What you can see
  • Request payloads, headers, query params, method, and full target URL
  • Response bodies, headers, status codes, latency, and upstream failures
  • Live traffic feed via SSE plus stored log history in SQLite
  • Multi-project routing with readable slugs like `/proxy/stripe-dev/*path`

Fast setup

Create a project, point it at the upstream base URL, and start sending traffic through a readable proxy slug.

Inspectable payloads

Headers and bodies are masked, truncated, and classified so text payloads stay readable while binary content stays safe.

Single-server deploy

The Go service owns proxying, APIs, SQLite, SSE, and the embedded static frontend for a clean MVP deploy story.
